channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 2 com severidade Crítica
• 9 com severidade Alta
• 18 novas CVEs
• 4 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-11859 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
An HTML injection vulnerability in the "fetch links" email sent by Thinkst Applied Research Canarytokens, enabling Interface Manipulation, Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) in emails clients that render HTML emails. This issue affects Canarytokens: from Docker tag sha-c0f3cf142 before sha-08c3f93d, from Git commit c0f3cf142 before 08c3f93d.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-11859
 
📰 VCF 9.1 Networking: Precision Workload Placement with VPC Network Span
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
A notícia está relacionada a ESX no contexto de segurança da informação, com potencial relevância para monitoramento, prevenção ou resposta.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/09/vcf-9-1-networking-precision-workload-placement-with-vpc-network-span/
 
📰 Improving VMware Cloud Foundation Performance with Enhanced Data Path (EDP)
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
As data center fabric speeds surge from 100Gbps toward 400Gbps, a silent bottleneck threatens virtual infrastructure: the hypervisor networking stack. Traditional packet handling introduces a linear serialization tax, consuming excessive CPU cycles just to parse, classify, and apply security rules. For modern enterprise clouds running on VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF), the Enhanced Data Path (EDP) …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/09/improving-vmware-cloud-foundation-performance-with-enhanced-data-path-edp/
 
📰 Broadcom’s Investment in Spring to Combat AI-Fueled Security Challenges in the Enterprise
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
For decades, Spring has provided a dependable development framework for millions of enterprise developers building Java applications. As the stewards of Spring, the Tanzu Division of Broadcom takes our role in the safety and security of the Spring and Java ecosystems seriously. To help address AI-driven developments in the current threat landscape, we’re excited to introduce …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/tanzu/broadcoms-investment-in-spring-to-combat-ai-fueled-security-challenges-in-the-enterprise/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 Veeam Backup & Replication RCE Flaw Lets Domain Users Run Remote Code
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.4
Resumo:
Veeam has released security patches to address a critical flaw in its Backup & Replication software that could result in remote code execution. Tracked as CVE-2026-44963, the vulnerability carries a CVSS score of 9.4 out of a maximum of 10.0. "A vulnerability allowing remote code execution (RCE) on the Backup Server by an authenticated domain user," Veeam said in a Tuesday advisory.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/veeam-backup-replication-rce-flaw-lets.html
 
🚨 WinRAR Flaw Exploited by Russia-Aligned Groups to Deploy Stealers in Ukraine
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Two Russia-aligned cyber attack campaigns have continued to exploit a security flaw in WinRAR to target Ukrainian organisations, almost a year after patches for the vulnerability were released. The activity has been attributed by Trend Micro to Earth Dahu (aka Gamaredon) and SHADOW-EARTH-066 (aka UAC-0226). It involves the exploitation of CVE-2025-8088, a path traversal flaw that allows an
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/winrar-flaw-exploited-by-russia-aligned.html
 
💣 Microsoft patches Exchange Server zero-day exploited in attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Microsoft has patched an actively exploited Exchange Server vulnerability that allows threat actors to execute arbitrary JavaScript code in cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks targeting Outlook Web Access users.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/microsoft/microsoft-patches-exchange-server-zero-day-exploited-in-attacks/
 
💣 Six Proto6 Vulnerabilities in protobuf.js Expose Node.js Apps to RCE and DoS
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity researchers have flagged half a dozen vulnerabilities in protobuf.js, a JavaScript and TypeScript implementation of Protocol Buffers (Protobuf), that, if successfully exploited, could result in remote code execution (RCE) and denial-of-service (DoS) attacks. "In affected environments, a single malicious protobuf schema, descriptor, or crafted payload could be enough to trigger
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/six-proto6-vulnerabilities-in.html
 
💣 Check Point VPN Zero-Day Exploited in Qilin Ransomware Attacks - SecurityWeek
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Check Point. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
💣 Microsoft Defender 'RoguePlanet' zero-day grants SYSTEM privileges
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A security researcher has released a new Microsoft Defender zero-day exploit named "RoguePlanet" just hours after Microsoft fixed two previously disclosed flaws during June 2026 Patch Tuesday.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/microsoft/microsoft-defender-rogueplanet-zero-day-grants-system-privileges/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-32193 - Azure
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.8
Resumo:
Improper limitation of a pathname to a restricted directory ('path traversal') in Microsoft Azure Kubernetes Service allows an authorized attacker to execute code locally.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-32193
 
🚨 USN-8417-1: Tomcat vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that Tomcat did not properly limit the size of WebDAV LOCK and PROPFIND request bodies. A remote attacker could use this issue to cause Tomcat to consume excessive memory, resulting in a denial of service. (CVE-2026-41284) It was discovered that Tomcat incorrectly validated HTTP/2 header fields. A remote attacker could use this issue to cause Tomcat to crash or possibly execute arbitrary code. (CVE-...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8417-1
 
🚨 USN-8415-1: Vim vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that Vim incorrectly handled marked filenames in the netrw plugin. An attacker could possibly use this issue to execute arbitrary code. (CVE-2026-43961) It was discovered that Vim incorrectly handled filenames when decompressing certain archives. An attacker could possibly use this issue to execute arbitrary code.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8415-1
 
🚨 CVE-2026-33113 - Office
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.4
Resumo:
Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') in Microsoft Office SharePoint allows an authorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-33113
 
🚨 CVE-2026-10862 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.4
Resumo:
The Accordions plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the Accordion body field in all versions up to, and including, 2.3.23 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Custom-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-10862
 
🚨 USN-8412-1: QEMU vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: 4.0
Resumo:
Felipe Franciosi, Raphael Norwitz, and Peter Turschmid discovered that the iSCSI block driver in QEMU incorrectly handled certain responses from an iSCSI server. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to cause QEMU to crash, resulting in a denial of service, or possibly execute arbitrary code. (CVE-2020-1711) It was discovered that the iSCSI block driver in QEMU incorrectly handled certain memory operations,...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8412-1
 
📰 Microsoft June 2026 Patch Tuesday Fixes 206 Flaws and 3 Zero-Days - Hackread
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Windows Server, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMif0FVX3lxTE9saGhmMV9hOVJhd0ZJcjhpUnVfM3VSNUhqWDBCTURMWFl0aGtfQnA5MkJHZUxWMTJuNlRpYzJOa1MxbVN2TXM2SU9JdE92UnN1cy14WFlWaXlWT0RNSWFHdXRBSFg5WDRNQjNjeW9JNEtPUGdGamIxUTJpT1pPVDg?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 08/06/2026 até 10/06/2026.
